diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_render.py
+++ b/inspect_render.py
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+import sys

+import inspect

+from pathlib import Path

+import json

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+from tsr.system import TSR

+import torch

+from PIL import Image

+

+print('Loading model for inspection...')

+model = TSR.from_pretrained(

+    '/models/triposr',

+    config_name='config.yaml',

+    weight_name='model.ckpt',

+)

+print('=== render signature ===')

+print(inspect.signature(model.render))

+print('\n=== render docstring ===')

+print(model.render.__doc__)

+

+print('\n=== renderer attributes/methods ===')

+print([attr for attr in dir(model.renderer) if not attr.startswith('_')])

+

+# Test data inspect

+print('\n=== data cameras example ===')

+data_path = Path('/data/val')

+obj_dir = next((d for d in data_path.iterdir() if d.is_dir() and (d/'input.png').exists()), None)

+if obj_dir:

+    with open(obj_dir/'cameras.json') as f:

+        cams = json.load(f)

+    print('View 0 (input):', cams[0])

+    print('Target example:', cams[1] if len(cams)>1 else 'N/A')

+print('Inspection complete.')
